text: They ……….. going to eat their lunch.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: 'They' + are + going to. ❌ be (مصدر)، is (مفرد)، am (مع I).

text: I ………… going to wear blue shoes tonight.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: I + am + going to. ❌ is (مفرد)، be (مصدر)، are (جمع).

text: …………… you going to cook dinner?
explanation: ✅ صحيح: Are you going to...? ❌ Am (مع I)، Is (مفرد)، Be (مصدر).

text: Sara …………… going to share her biscuits.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: Sara (مفرد) + is not going to. ❌ am not (مع I)، are not (جمع)، be not (مصدر).

text: They ………………… the house next week.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: They + are going to leave (خطة مستقبلية). ❌ is leaving (مفرد)، leaves (مضارع مفرد)، leave (مضارع جمع).

text: Jack ………………………… home tomorrow.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: Jack (مفرد) + is going to walk. ❌ walks (مضارع)، walk (مصدر)، walking (اسم فاعل).

text: I am going to ……….. my hands.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: بعد going to نستخدم المصدر (wash). ❌ washed (ماضي)، washes (مفرد)، washing (اسم فاعل).

text: I ………………………….. to cinema next week.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: I + am going to go. ❌ be (مصدر)، are (جمع)، is (مفرد).

text: The rabbit is going to …………. the carrot.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: بعد going to نستخدم المصدر (eat). ❌ ate (ماضي)، eating (اسم فاعل)، eats (مضارع مفرد).

text: They are going to ………………… football.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: بعد going to نستخدم المصدر (play). ❌ plays (مفرد)، playing (اسم فاعل)، played (ماضي).

text: Choose the correct structure:
options: She is going to travel next month.
She am going to travel next month.
She is going to traveling next month.
correct: She is going to travel next month.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: She + is + going to + travel. ❌ travels (مضارع بسيط لا يعبر عن خطة مستقبلية)، am (مع I)، traveling (بعد to نستخدم المصدر).

text: Choose the correct structure:
options: I is going to be sick.
I am going to been sick.
They am going to be sick.
I am going to be sick.
correct: I am going to be sick.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: I + am + going to + be. ❌ is مع I، been (past participle)، they am (خطأ).

text: Tom doesn't wear a …………….. ring.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: wedding ring (خاتم زواج). ❌ graduation تخرج، transportation نقل، attraction جذب سياحي.

text: ……………………… ceremony for the high school will be next month.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: graduation ceremony (حفل تخرج). ❌ attraction جذب، transportation نقل، wedding زفاف.

text: Tracksuits and ………………………. belong at the gym.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: أحذية رياضية (sneakers) تلبس في النادي الرياضي. ❌ raincoat معطف مطر، abaya عباءة، tie ربطة عنق.

text: These …………… kept her hands warm.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: القفازات (gloves) تحمي اليدين. ❌ sandals صنادل، sweaters كنزات، socks جوارب.

text: This …………… and this blouse go together well.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: التنورة (skirt) تلبس مع البلوزة. ❌ shomagh شماغ، dress فستان، thobe ثوب.

text: The color of leaves is …………. in summer.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: لون الأوراق في الصيف أخضر. ❌ red أحمر، beige بيج، purple أرجواني.

text: He took his shoes and ………… off.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: خلع حذاءه وجواربه (socks). ❌ coats معاطف، scarf وشاح، suit بدلة.

text: The train is a safe means of ………………..
explanation: ✅ صحيح: وسيلة نقل (transportation). ❌ graduation تخرج، attraction جذب، wedding زفاف.

text: Students are celebrating their ……………………. party.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: حفل التخرج (graduation party). ❌ tea شاي، wedding زفاف، birthday ميلاد.

text: They took lots of pictures at their son's gr__duation.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: graduation تكتب بحرف a. ❌ e, i, o.

text: Pi__k roses are beautiful.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: pink (وردي) تكتب بحرف n. ❌ s, r, m.

text: I'm wearing an __range T-shirt.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: orange (برتقالي) تكتب بحرف o. ❌ i, e, a.

text: He's got a great sense of s__yle.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: style (أناقة) تكتب بحرف t. ❌ v, k, m.

text: The collar of his sh__rt was dirty.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: shirt (قميص) تكتب بحرف i. ❌ u, o, a.

text: I will get __arried, and my w__dding will be next week. (2 missing letters)
explanation: ✅ صحيح: married (متزوج) بحرف m، wedding (زفاف) بحرف e. ❌ t-u, v-a, j-i.

text: They will wear green dr__sses in their graduation party.
explanation: ✅ صحيح: dresses (فساتين) تكتب بحرف e و d. ❌ o-k, a-g, i-x.
